source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 鼓励包容并蓄 促进文明互鉴
topics.official_english: Encourage Inclusiveness and Promote Mutual Learning Among Civilizations
topics.why_hot: Reflects China's official stance on cultural exchange and global cooperation, resonating with current diplomatic narratives.
topics.share_angle: Explain how this principle applies to everyday cross-cultural interactions and its significance in global affairs.

topics.chinese_topic: 女生高考684分花3000元咨询进双非
topics.official_english: Student with 684 Gaokao Score Spends 3,000 Yuan on Admission Consultation for Non-Top-Tier University
topics.why_hot: Highlights the intense competition and anxiety around Gaokao admissions, sparking debate on education equity and consultation services.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the pressures of Gaokao and the rise of admission consulting services in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 西班牙夺冠狂欢震动地震仪
topics.why_hot: A quirky and viral story showing how fan celebrations were so intense they registered on seismic equipment.
topics.share_angle: A lighthearted look at how sports celebrations can have unexpected scientific effects.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国制造加速涌现“新”力量
topics.official_english: Made in China Accelerates the Emergence of 'New' Forces
topics.why_hot: Showcases China's manufacturing upgrade and innovation, a key economic narrative.
topics.share_angle: Highlight examples of new technologies and products driving China's manufacturing transformation.

topics.chinese_topic: 卖一辆10万元新车仅赚1500元
topics.official_english: Selling a 100,000 Yuan New Car Yields Only 1,500 Yuan Profit
topics.why_hot: Reveals thin profit margins in the auto industry, sparking discussion on market competition and business sustainability.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the economics of car sales and what it means for consumers and manufacturers.

topics.chinese_topic: 科创50涨超6% 芯片股领涨
topics.official_english: STAR 50 Index Surges Over 6%, Chip Stocks Lead Gains
topics.why_hot: Reflects strong investor interest in tech and semiconductor sectors, a hot topic in financial markets.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of the STAR 50 index and the chip sector's performance for China's tech ambitions.

topics.official_english: BBA (BMW, Benz, Audi) Slash Prices Significantly This Year
topics.why_hot: Major price cuts by luxury car brands signal intense competition and changing market dynamics.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the reasons behind the price war and its impact on the luxury car market in China.

topics.official_english: Table Tennis Super League Bans Foreign Players, Mandates Under-19 Rule
topics.why_hot: A significant policy change in Chinese table tennis, affecting player development and league competitiveness.
topics.share_angle: Explore the rationale behind the new rules and their potential impact on the sport.
